description_long: This is a modern, circular coffee table set featuring two overlapping round surfaces at different heights, both supported by a geometric black metal frame. The table tops appear to be made of tinted glass, giving a sleek and contemporary look. The frame consists of angular metal legs that provide stability and a visually interesting base, with one table slightly nested under the other. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments. The glass surfaces are smooth and reflective, contrasting with the matte black metal structure. This table set would be suitable for urban environments such as parks, plazas, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern, two-piece round coffee table set with tinted glass tops and a geometric black metal frame, featuring overlapping surfaces at different heights.
description_view_0: Front view showing both round glass tops, with the smaller table partially nested under the larger one and the angular metal frame visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height difference between the two tables and the open space created by the offset arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the alignment of the two glass tops and the supporting metal legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, again emphasizing the staggered heights and the open, geometric base.
attribute_number_of_legs: three angular metal legs per table
